measured.source: conductor run on a live WeChat DevTools session + 60 node:test cases + 3 independent fresh-subagent batteries + the deterministic run_all harness
measured.deterministic_harness: scripts/run_all.mjs — 14 contract checks vs `vince-mp capabilities --json`; --self-test proves each discriminates; gated by check_release_gate + check_battery_clean
measured.cli_unit_tests: 60/60 pass (snapshot 2026-06-05; run `cd tools/vince-mp-cli && npm test` for the current count)
measured.warm_command_latency_ms: ~100 end-to-end (node startup + warm-daemon roundtrip); daemon step 3-72ms vs. a full reconnect per call before
measured.one_command_connect: verified live — resolve miniprogramRoot + ensure automation port + attach
measured.connection_reuse: verified — 20 concurrent requests over one connection in 49ms
measured.uid_stability_across_calls: verified — query then tap in separate CLI invocations
measured.auto_reconnect_recovery: verified — transport-error reconnect+retry and explicit `session reconnect`
measured.console_accuracy: verified — one console.log shows as one entry after coalescing (was 5-8x)
measured.independent_battery_verdict: industrial (zero bugs on the final certification pass)
